## Summary

Describe the problem and the change.

## Verification

- [ ] I ran `python scripts/validate.py`.
- [ ] I ran `python -m unittest discover -s tests -v`.
- [ ] I ran `python scripts/catalog.py --check` after regenerating the catalog.
- [ ] Installation remains copy-only and does not execute contributed scripts.

## New or changed skill checklist

- [ ] The directory name matches the `SKILL.md` name.
- [ ] The description explains what the skill does and when it should trigger.
- [ ] `skills.json` includes an example, requirements, provenance, and license.
- [ ] Original work is submitted under MIT, or upstream source, revision, and license are included.
- [ ] The contribution contains no credentials, private conversations, unpublished material, or machine-specific paths.
- [ ] Destructive or externally visible actions require explicit user intent and confirmation.
